title: hepetis staminea var. longicauda
intro: Hepetis staminea var. longicauda, also known as Long-stalked Hedeoma or Long-stalked Hedeoma, is a perennial herb native to the Americas, belonging to the mint family (Lamiaceae). This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antispasmodic effects. The health benefits of Hepetis staminea var. longicauda include relief from digestive issues, respiratory problems, and muscle spasms, as well as its potential to reduce fever and alleviate stress. Traditionally, the plant is used to prepare teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed orally to harness its medicinal properties and health benefits.
